data.content: Plan review approved. The 6-step plan with 3 child knots (e01f: doctor, c891: CLI/setup, 9c9a: docs/tests) is complete, correct, and feasible. Prompt-guidance code is well-isolated from execution prompts — no shared constants or functions at risk. All affected files identified: doctor.ts, install.sh, setup.sh, build-runtime-artifact.sh, PROMPT*.md, README, docs, and 3 test files. normalizeProfileId() import cleanup in doctor.ts is safe since the function is defined in workflows.ts. Ready for implementation.
